name: BOBCARD ETERNA
exclusions: fuel transactions do not earn reward points
accelerated reward points are subject to monthly cap
taxes and charges excluded as per BOBCARD terms
milestoneBenefits: 10,000 bonus reward points on spending Rs 50,000 within first 60 days
20,000 bonus reward points on annual spends of Rs 5,00,000
additionalBenefits: 15 reward points per Rs 100 on travel, dining, online and international transactions
3 reward points per Rs 100 on other categories
Reward points redeemable as cashback at 1 reward point = Rs 0.25
1% fuel surcharge waiver on fuel transactions between Rs 400 and Rs 5,000, capped at Rs 250 per statement cycle
Free personal accident death cover: air Rs 1 crore, non-air Rs 10 lakh
Up to 3 lifetime free add-on cards

salaried: Resident Indian primary cardholder between 21 and 65 years
Income of Rs 12 lakh per annum or more
selfEmployed: Resident Indian primary cardholder between 21 and 65 years
Income of Rs 12 lakh per annum or more
